case_title: STEPHEN J DUCAT VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUCAT, STEPHEN J AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUCAT, STEPHEN J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $14,264.13 PRINCIPAL, $46.75 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,680.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
